scripts.demo: concurrently -k -n backend,simulator,frontend -c cyan,magenta,green "cd backend && DEMO_MODE=true npm run dev" "cd backend && DEMO_MODE=true npm run simulator" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
scripts.verify: npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:build
scripts.verify:full: npm run backend:migrate && npm run backend:seed && npm run verify
